description_long: This is a large, modern residential house surrounded by a landscaped yard with numerous trees and shrubbery. The house features a flat roof with multiple skylights and large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a small parking area and a prominent entryway with steps and a walkway. On the opposite side, there is a sizable pond or water feature, adding to the aesthetic appeal of the property. The exterior walls are finished in a muted pinkish tone, complemented by white and gray accents around the windows and roof. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes well-maintained pathways and garden beds.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with extensive windows, landscaped gardens, and a pond, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the pond, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pond as a central feature, large windows, and the back garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, parking area, and additional landscaping details.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a walkway, and a modest overhang, flanked by landscaped garden beds.
